title: Living Mause 5
description: "The good old days..." This mod adds the 'Minecraft - 02 Test' song from DeadMau5.
body:
## About it

"The good old days..." This mod adds the 'Minecraft - 02 Test' song from DeadMau5, and the music disc.

## How to play it?

You can't use it in Jukeboxes, i'll try to fix it one day. You can only play it using this command:

/playsound living_mause_:livingmouse5 record (or ambient) @a
